mapper.select: SELECT * FROM system_param WHERE param_key = #{paramKey} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

update.foreach: UPDATE system_param SET param_value = #{param.paramValue}, update_time = NOW() WHERE param_key = #{param.paramKey} AND is_deleted = 0

mapper.select: SELECT * FROM system_param WHERE status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY param_key ASC
